textByHashes.4b0860bbd1294be5c8a86643ba572802293b5784: Only the Theatre can free you!
textByHashes.457b4d934d84a8c0c39de9f0a0426f75782aefcf: Verzik Vitur cordially invites you to the Theatre.
textByHashes.3320973de00752bbae95bd63c37d94c60116b4d0: Welcome, one and all, to the Theatre of Blood.
textByHashes.820d6345dfa3e27ab33aa3240310ee9964db2aff: Glory awaits those who enter the Theatre!
textByHashes.7cbf490882d443a10d2663049956a4868a836ce6: Prove your worth in the Theatre!
